auth.useMagicLink: We'll email you a sign-in link.
auth.passwordOnlyNote: Access is restricted to invited users with a password. Magic links are disabled for this product.
auth.securityCheckRequired: Complete the security check to continue.
auth.securityCheckFailed: We could not validate the security check.
auth.networkError: We could not reach the authentication service. Try again in a few seconds.
auth.resetEmailSent: If the user exists, we sent a link to set a new password.
auth.resetRequestFailed: We could not send the password reset link.
auth.loginPrinciple: Sign in to review context, board packs, decisions, and follow-ups in a protected governance workspace.
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click it to continue.
auth.noEmailNote: Didn't get it? Check your spam folder, or
auth.welcomeBack: Sign in to Board Governance OS

companyBrain.title: Institutional memory
companyBrain.intakeDescription: Capture chat, voice-ready notes, files, financials, risks, and company context before the governance cycle starts.

intake.title: Build the board-level context
intake.description: Collect the facts, assumptions, files, and open questions that the Board Brain needs before a Governance Run.
intake.savedLiveWithFileErrors: {inputs} inputs and {entries} memories saved. {files} files uploaded; {errors} failed.
intake.signInRequired: Sign in to save to Supabase

company.title: Company profile
company.description: The basic operating context for the governance cycle.
company.name: Company name

strategy.title: Strategy and challenge
strategy.description: What the founder thinks the business needs and what the board should challenge.

finance.title: Financial snapshot
finance.description: Enough financial context to discuss cash, risk, and investment with discipline.

team.title: Team and operating cadence
team.description: Who owns execution and where the founder is still the bottleneck.

chat.title: Chat intake
chat.description: Use this as the founder interview transcript. It can later become a live chat with Board Brain.
chat.prompt: What should the board understand before reviewing this company?
chat.placeholder: Type a founder note, board question, or context fragment...

voice.title: Voice-ready intake
voice.description: No transcription service is connected yet. For now, paste voice notes or transcript text here.
voice.placeholder: Paste transcript or voice note summary...

files.title: Files and source material
files.description: Queue PDFs, decks, spreadsheets, documents, and CSVs for later Supabase storage and extraction.

review.title: Review before governance run
review.description: This is the local payload that will later be persisted to Company Brain.
review.notReady: Needs more context before the run
